privileged_info_summary: The task involves analyzing call center KPIs from synthetic data with 4640 total offered calls, 4376 answered, resulting in a weighted service level of 0.7739 (approximately 77.39%), and weighted average handle time of 425.5 seconds. The task requires calculating metrics across 24 thirty-minute intervals and computing weighted (not simple) averages on a Daily_Dashboard sheet. The metadata claim of expected_global_sl = 0.764 (76.4%) is incorrect; the verifier code calculates and checks for 0.7739 (77.39%).
